headline: Tinder Vs. Bumble: A Turnaround Duel Of Dating Giants
summary: Match Group, Inc.'s turnaround outlook improves as Hinge surges despite Tinder declines. Click for more on MTCH and how it compares to Bumble Inc. (BMBL).
